title: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Big Mom Pirates, Judge, Big Mom, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How many more days is it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Choose wisely.[1] kill and Rob when necessary..)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's all eat some scrump..tious, tasty... Caake ]]

dialogue.text: This will be a rather sweet deal.)

dialogue.text: It's the tea party from Hell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Will there be some strawberry jam?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, will it be made from someone's blood~?)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just make sure to come if you were invited !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will be a sweet day with a perfectly devilish sacrifice.)

dialogue.text: A country that's full of all kinds of people- Eeeee........!!!

dialogue.text: Ooohh I can't wait~) I've heard through the grapevince that he's already here as well-?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Land of Dreams?! A Hellish Tea Party is about to begin!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
